symptoms: ddl/schematracker: fix SetDDL will cause data race
failure_signature: ddl/schematracker: fix SetDDL will cause data race
root_cause_explanation: The mock store/domain can inject a DDL checker via `dom.SetDDL(...)`. Previously, the DDL injection could happen after bootstrap while other goroutines/internal SQL might access `dom.DDL()` or related global handlers, triggering a Go data race. This PR stabilizes the tests by injecting the DDL checker earlier (before/at bootstrap via a mockstore option) to avoid racing with domain initialization.
fix_pattern: Inject the DDL checker/SetDDL earlier (before bootstrap) so it does not race with domain initialization/internal SQL.

evidence: evidence: ddl/schematracker: fix SetDDL will cause data race
